label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to work through this. The question is asking about the technologies Google used for Google Glass. The options are whether they are completely new, mostly already in smartphones, high-tech but out-of-date, or all old. Looking back at the passage, the very first sentence says, "Most of the technologies for Google Glass are already available on smart phones." That seems really important. So the majority are existing in smartphones. The next part mentions that Google took these same technologies and added them to eyeglass frames.
